content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/ocs/dashboards/persistent-internal/pool-utilization-card/PoolUtilizationPopoverContent.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 5 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 49
Rule [family:Label]:
## Label Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Label closeBtn={...} closeBtnAriaLabel={...} closeBtnProps={...} color={...} editableProps={...} href={...} icon={...} isClickable={...} />
```

Props that stay on <Label>: closeBtn, closeBtnAriaLabel, closeBtnProps, color, editableProps, href, icon, isClickable, isCompact, isDisabled, isEditable, onClick, onClose, onEditCancel, onEditComplete, render, status, textMaxWidth, tooltipPosition, variant

Prop type changes:
  color: 'blue' | 'cyan' | 'green' | 'orange' | 'purple' | 'red' | 'grey' | 'gold' -> 'blue' | 'teal' | 'green' | 'orange' | 'purple' | 'red' | 'orangered' | 'grey' | 'yellow'
  color: 'blue' | 'cyan' | 'green' | 'orange' | 'purple' | 'red' | 'grey' | 'gold' -> 'blue' | 'teal' | 'green' | 'orange' | 'purple' | 'red' | 'orangered' | 'grey' | 'yellow'
  variant: 'outline' | 'filled' -> 'outline' | 'filled' | 'overflow' | 'add'
  variant: 'outline' | 'filled' -> 'outline' | 'filled' | 'overflow' | 'add'

Deprecated -> v6 migration:
  Old import: @patternfly/react-core
  New import: @patternfly/react-core
Matching props:
New props on replacement:
  closeBtn: React.ReactNode
  closeBtnProps: any
  color: 'blue' | 'teal' | 'green' | 'orange' | 'purple' | 'red' | 'orangered' | 'grey' | 'yellow'
  editableProps: any
  href: string
  icon: React.ReactNode
  isClickable: boolean
  isCompact: boolean
  isDisabled: boolean
  isEditable: boolean
  onClose: (event: React.MouseEvent) => void
  onEditCancel: (event: KeyboardEvent, previousText: string) => void
  onEditComplete: (event: MouseEvent | KeyboardEvent, newText: string) => void
  render: ({
    className,
    content,
    componentRef
  }: {
    className: string;
    content: React.ReactNode;
    componentRef: any;
  }) => React.ReactNode
  status: 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger' | 'info' | 'custom'
  variant: 'outline' | 'filled' | 'overflow' | 'add'
Removed props (no replacement equivalent): badge, component, isOverflowChip, isReadOnly, ouiaId

Incidents found in this file:
  Line 49: [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-label-label-labelprops-d-ts-label-variant-type-changed]
    componentName: Label
    module: @patternfly/react-core
    propName: variant
    propValue: filled
    Fix strategy:
      Strategy: PropTypeChange
      Component: Label
      Prop: variant
      From: 'filled' | 'outline'
      To: 'add' | 'filled' | 'outline' | 'overflow'

Code contexts:
  (line 49):
   48              <Label
   49                variant="filled"
   50                color={pool.type === PoolType.BLOCK ? 'blue' : 'green'}



Code context:
```
(no snippet)
```

### Fix 2
Line: 65
Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-color-200' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200

Code context:
```
   64        {pool.critical && (
   65          <div className="pf-v5-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200">
   66            {t('Storage pool critically full. Add capacity to avoid disruptions')}

```

### Fix 3
Lines: 45, 58
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <DescriptionListTerm> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <DescriptionListTerm> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <DescriptionListTerm><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</DescriptionListTerm>
  After:  <DescriptionListTerm icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</DescriptionListTerm>

Incident context:
  componentName: DescriptionListTerm
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListGroup

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: DescriptionListTerm
Prop: icon

This rule affects multiple locations in the file. Apply ALL steps together as one logical change.

Code contexts:
```
  (line 45):
   44          <DescriptionListGroup>
   45            <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Used:')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   46            <DescriptionListDescription>

  (line 58):
   57          <DescriptionListGroup>
   58            <DescriptionListTerm>{t('Maximum available:')}</DescriptionListTerm>
   59            <DescriptionListDescription>

```

### Fix 4
Line: 48
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-label]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Label> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Label> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Label variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Label>
  After:  <Label variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Label> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Label><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Label>
  After:  <Label icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Label>

Incident context:
  componentName: Label
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: DescriptionListDescription

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Label
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   47              {pool.usedCapacity}
   48              <Label
   49                variant="filled"

```

### Fix 5
Line: 65
Rule [semver-css-class-removed-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' has no equivalent in the new version. There is no valid 'pf-v6-u-color-200' class — this class was removed, not renamed.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a component prop.

Incident context:
  matchingText: pf-v5-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200

Code context:
```
   64        {pool.critical && (
   65          <div className="pf-v5-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200">
   66            {t('Storage pool critically full. Add capacity to avoid disruptions')}

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/ocs/dashboards/persistent-internal/pool-utilization-card/PoolUtilizationPopoverContent.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

**Fix 1 (Line 49):** `variant="filled"` on `<Label>`. The rule says `variant` type changed from `'filled' | 'outline'` to `'add' | 'filled' | 'outline' | 'overflow'`. The value `"filled"` is still valid in v6. **No change needed.**

**Fix 2 (Line 65):** CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` was removed. The className is `"pf-v5-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200"`. Note that `pf-v5-u-mt-sm` also needs attention — but only `pf-v5-u-color-200` is called out as removed. Looking at the current file, line 65 shows `"pf-v6-u-mt-sm pf-v5-u-color-200"` — so `pf-v5-u-mt-sm` was already migrated to `pf-v6-u-mt-sm` in a previous pass. The `pf-v5-u-color-200` has no v6 equivalent. I should remove it. The remaining className would be just `"pf-v6-u-mt-sm"`.

**Fix 3 (Lines 45, 58):** `<DescriptionListTerm>` — icon content should be moved to `icon` prop. Looking at lines 45 and 58, these `<DescriptionListTerm>` elements contain only text (`{t('Used:')}` and `{t('Maximum available:')}`), no icons. **No change needed** — these don't contain any icon elements.

**Fix 4 (Line 48):** `<Label>` — icon content should be moved to `icon` prop. Looking at the `<Label>` at line 48-54, it contains `{volumeType}` which is text, not an icon. **No change needed** — the Label doesn't contain any icon elements.

**Fix 5 (Line 65):** Same as Fix 2 — `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed. Same change needed.

So the only actual change is removing `pf-v5-u-color-200` from line 65.
Let me verify the final file looks correct:

File looks correct. All changes are clean.

## Changes Applied

| Fix | Rule | Status | Details |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| **Fix 1** | `Label variant type-changed` (line 49) | **No change needed** | `variant="filled"` is still a valid value in v6 (`'add' \| 'filled' \| 'outline' \| 'overflow'`). No migration required. |
| **Fix 2** | `sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200` (line 65) | **Applied** | Removed `pf-v5-u-color-200` from className. This class was removed in v6 with no equivalent. The remaining class `pf-v6-u-mt-sm` (already migrated in a prior pass) is preserved. |
| **Fix 3** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-descriptionlistterm` (lines 45, 58) | **No change needed** | Both `<DescriptionListTerm>` instances contain only text children (`{t('Used:')}` and `{t('Maximum available:')}`), not icon elements. The rule only applies when icon components from `@patternfly/react-icons` are present as children. |
| **Fix 4** | `sd-icon-children-to-prop-label` (line 48) | **No change needed** | The `<Label>` contains `{volumeType}` which is a text string, not an icon element. No icon-to-prop migration needed. |
| **Fix 5** | `semver-css-class-removed-u-color-200` (line 65) | **Applied** (same change as Fix 2) | Both Fix 2 and Fix 5 target the same `pf-v5-u-color-200` class removal on line 65. Addressed by the single edit. |
